canonical_name: Baal/Nihl/Diablo GC can roll 45 life via high ilvl/alvl
statement: A Grand Charm must have sufficiently high ilvl (e.g., from Baal/Diablo/Nihlathak) to reach the affix level required for the 41-45 Life suffix (of Vita).
formula: (high ilvl) -> high alvl -> allows Vita(41-45 life) suffix
conditions: Depends on ilvl/alvl rules for affixes
notes: Seed record; numeric thresholds will be added once alvl formula + affix req tables are ingested.
